spike: S5 End to end proof path
live_testnet_status: blocked on funded deployer wallet, ready to broadcast

test_endToEnd_agentRight.scenario: agent registers, commits claim with 5 USDC bond, two payers each unlock for 0.25 USDC, settlement marks agent right, agent claims 5.5 USDC (bond + total paid), reputation +1 win, payers blocked from refund

test_endToEnd_agentWrong.scenario: same setup, settlement marks agent wrong, bond fully slashed (5 USDC), each payer claims 250k paid back + 125k bonus (capped at 5000 bps), agent blocked from earnings, leftover 4.75 USDC stays in escrow as uncapped slash residual

test_endToEnd_publicReveal.scenario: after settlement, public reveal verifies keccak256(claimText, salt) matches stored claimHash, state -> PubliclyRevealed

test_endToEnd_singlePayer_bondPoolUncapp.scenario: single payer, small bond (100k) relative to payment (1M), full bond pool flows to payer as bonus (under cap)

next_steps_for_full_PASS: Fund deployer wallet on Mantle Sepolia (~1 MNT)
Capture testnet addresses, append to docs/SPIKE_5_RECEIPTS.json
Run agent/src/spikes/s1-q402.ts on testnet for live tx hash
Repeat the wrong-path scenario as a live testnet integration
